policy.empty: LO empty string == ironcalc empty cell
policy.errors: both-error = agreement class both_error; code equality reported separately; LO #NAME? rows flagged lo_name_error (no oracle)
policy.numbers: relative 1e-9, absolute 1e-12 near zero; exact zero only matches exact zero; non-bit-identical agreements counted as within_tolerance

meta.reference: LibreOffice-computed cached values from the converted workbook
